sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78967" key="paratro/xia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρατρόχ-ια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, part of a chariot <sense id="n78967.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beside the wheel</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:147" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.147</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
